购买须知：
1、定购常规商品的保障金不能低于货物总额的30%，工程和非标定制商品的保障金不能低于货物总额50%。
The security payment for regular goods shall not be less than 30% of the total amount of goods, and the security payment for public funds and non-
standard customized goods shall not be less than 50% of the total amount of goods.
2、特殊定做的商品、特价商品不允许退换。
Special custom goods, special price goods can not be returned for exchange.
